# terrible_community_proxmox_proxmox_ceph_mds (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `node` (String) The cluster node name.
- `state` (String) Indicate whether the Ceph mds should be present (created if missing) or absent (deleted if it exists).

### Read-Only

- `mds` (String) The node name.
- `msg` (String) The output message that the module generates.
